title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Kinemon, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Beast Pirates, Unknown person #3, Momonosuke as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: admit it, Kinemon! Be honest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Poui Pout

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: everything ended up al- right in the end, so I won't get angry, so say it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop it already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He achieved a feat, despite himself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You honestly thought that it was tokage port didn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I might actually die in this battle today.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I feel like I've just used up a life's worth of luck.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I indeed had a lot of luck!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Kine- Mon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You are our leader!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You didn't just spend your own luck!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But our luck aswell!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's right! Kin-sama

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When you die, I won't allow you to die alone!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Raise your sword, Kinemon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We will win the first battle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are Samural that served under open-sama together

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were all born and brought up in different places

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when you die, know that we die together

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Prepare the cannons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They have extreme numbers!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter how many they are, we have a warship, and they only have boats!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hearing that from you shabby guys doesn't make me happy at all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whatever my fate will be, I'll accept it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Time to report, I have fulfilled my role!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now there is only one thing left to do!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's dispel of the humiliation done to Lord Oden!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Well said, Kinemon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And let's change the face of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wano!!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: Did you contact Onigashima!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: i tried, but they are held up because of the banquet, they did not respond...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kawa- Matsu!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "Because I'll

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't let you get Lord MOMONO- Suke!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you manage to catch me, fishman,

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: It is already over for the Kozuki

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kawa- Matsu »!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: MOMONO- SURE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WUAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will also find Hiyori and I will kill her!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that I know that she's still alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You liar!! Now you can draw a bird that can fly aswell!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when you were with us we only got

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Your old rotten designs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Goodbye, guys!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: gyaa! It is high!! I am scared!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 54 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
